laws.title: Connecticut Minimum Wage — $16.94/hr (Effective January 1, 2026)
laws.summary: Connecticut's minimum wage increased to $16.94/hr on January 1, 2026, the highest in its history and second-highest among states (behind Washington at $17.13). Connecticut's minimum wage is indexed to the Employment Cost Index than anual CPI adjustments. Tipped employees must receive at least $7.62/hr in direct wages.
